name: Winter Squash & Apple Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vegetables, apples, and water in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce the heat and let simmer for 30 minutes, or until all the vegetables are tender.
4. Add the seasonings.
5. Use a blender to process the mixture.
6. Heat the soup again on low heat until it is hot.
7. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3-5 days.
